zh.lifeSummary: 當Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei於大約1270年出生在羅馬尼亞t阿拉 洛尼亞斯卡時，他的父親Thocomarius "Tihomir" Khan of Wallachia of the Blue Horde16歲，母親Мунга Тимур42歲。他於大約1310年與Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1352年在羅馬尼亞阿斯i普倫享年83歲，埋葬在羅馬尼亞阿斯庫特亞 德 阿斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei于大约1270年出生在罗马尼亚t阿拉 洛尼亞斯卡时，他的父亲Thocomarius "Tihomir" Khan of Wallachia of the Blue Horde16岁，母亲Мунга Тимур42岁。他于大约1310年与Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1352年在罗马尼亚阿斯i普倫享年83岁，埋葬在罗马尼亚阿斯庫特亞 德 阿斯。

nameMeanings.name: Basarab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ukrainian, Rusyn, Moldovan, Romanian, and Polish: from Basarab, an ethnic name for someone from Bessarabia, now Moldova, or, in a transferred sense, for a Wallachian (see Vlachos ).

variants.name: Vlachos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Christos, Constantine, Dimitrios, Haralambos, Konstantinos, Koula, Labros, Pantelis, Stamatios, Vaios, Vasilios.

Greek: ethnic name for an Aromanian or Vlach, a member of Romanized, traditionally pastoralist population living in the Balkans, speaking a language closely related to Romanian. Through ethnic stereotyping, the Greek ethnic name, which is cognate with Slavic Vlah (see Vlasic ), came to denote a highlander. Any of these senses could be involved in the development of the surname. It is also a shortened form of compound surnames beginning with Vlach-, for example Vlachogiannis, meaning ‘John the Aromanian, John the hillbilly’, and Vlachakis (see Vlahakis ). Compare Vlahos .

en.lifeSummary: When Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei was born about 1270, in Wallachia, Romania, his father, Thocomarius "Tihomir" Khan of Wallachia of the Blue Horde, was 16 and his mother, Мунга Тимур, was 42. He married Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia about 1310. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1352, in Cîmpulung, Argeş, Romania, at the age of 83, and was buried in Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Romania.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei est né environ 1270, à Valachie, Roumanie, son père, Thocomarius "Tihomir" Khan of Wallachia of the Blue Horde, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Мунга Тимур, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia environ 1310. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1352, à Cîmpulung, Argeş, Roumanie, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Roumanie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei um 1270 in Walachei, Rumänien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thocomarius "Tihomir" Khan of Wallachia of the Blue Horde 16 und seine Mutter Мунга Тимур 42. Er hat um 1310 Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1352 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Cîmpulung, Argeş, Rumänien und wurde in Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Rumänien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei è nato il circa 1270 nel Țara Românească, Romania, il suo padre, Thocomarius "Tihomir" Khan of Wallachia of the Blue Horde, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Мунга Тимур, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia circa 1310. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1352, nel Cîmpulung, Argeş, Romania, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Romania.

ja.lifeSummary: Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walacheiが約1270年にルーマニアtアラ ロムaネアスクaで生まれた時，父Thocomarius "Tihomir" Khan of Wallachia of the Blue Hordeは16歳，母Мунга Тимурは42歳であった。約1310年にLady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachiaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1352年にルーマニアアルジェsクiンプウルングで83歳で死去し，ルーマニアアルジェsクウルテア ド アルジェsにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei(이)가 대략 1270년 루마니아 t아라 롬a니아스ca에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thocomarius "Tihomir" Khan of Wallachia of the Blue Horde(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Мунга Тимур(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 1310년 Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1352년 루마니아 아그s ci풀운에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 루마니아 아그s 커테아 데 아그s에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Țara Românească, Romênia, seu pai, Thocomarius "Tihomir" Khan of Wallachia of the Blue Horde, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Мунга Тимур, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia aproximadamente 1310. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1352, em Cîmpulung, Argeş, Romênia, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Romênia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei родился около 1270 г. в местности tара ромaнискa, Румыния, его отцу по имени Thocomarius "Tihomir" Khan of Wallachia of the Blue Horde было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Мунга Тимур, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia около 1310 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1352 г. в местности кiмпулунг, аргеs, Румыния в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности куртеа де аргеs, аргеs, Румыния.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei nació aproximadamente 1270, en Țara Românească, Rumania, su papá, Thocomarius "Tihomir" Khan of Wallachia of the Blue Horde, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Мунга Тимур, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia aproximadamente 1310. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1352, en Cîmpulung, Argeş, Rumania, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Rumania.
